trials.supervisor_analysis: Baseline established at score 61.0 (3.09ms reference, 2.82ms optimized with torch.compile). Profiling shows ConvTranspose3d ~70%, MaxPool3d ~15%, elementwise fused ~15%. Advancing to optimization stage.

nudges.text: Your hand-written Triton kernel for softmax+subtract+swish+max is slower than PyTorch's separate kernels. Consider trying `torch.compile(mode="max-autotune")` on the entire model or just the post-conv/pool operations as your first optimization lever — it can auto-fuse those elementwise ops effectively without manual kernel work. You can still use PyTorch's ConvTranspose3d and MaxPool3d. Revert to a working state before attempting more complex changes.
